error.invalid_issue_token: Invalid issue token URL. Must start with {accounts_url} and contain the issueToken action.
error.invalid_cookies: Invalid cookies format. Ensure you copied the complete cookie header from the oauth2/iframe request.
error.invalid_code: Invalid or expired token. Make sure you copied the complete oauth_token value (starts with oauth2_4/) and try again with a fresh sign-in.

user.description: Select your Account Type. Most users will need to select Google Account. Field Test is only available for selected testers in the Google Field Test program.

auth_method.title: Authentication Method
auth_method.description: Choose how to connect your Nest account. The **Master token** method is recommended: it stays logged in and does not expire after a few hours.

master_token.title: Connect with a Master Token
master_token.description:
This creates a long-lived login that does not expire after a few hours. It only stops working if you change your Google password or revoke access.

1. Open an **Incognito/Private** window and go to [Google EmbeddedSetup]({embedded_setup_url})
2. Sign in with the Google account that owns your Nest devices (2-step verification is fine)
3. If asked **"Who will be using this device?"**, choose **I will be using this device**
4. Click **I agree** if prompted. The page may then show a spinner forever — that is expected, ignore it.
5. Open **Developer Tools** (F12) → **Application** tab → **Cookies** → `{accounts_url}`
6. Find the cookie named **`oauth_token`** and copy its **Value** (it starts with `oauth2_4/`)
7. Enter your Google email and paste that value below

⚠️ Do not share these — they grant access to your Google account.

data_description.google_email: The Google account that owns your Nest devices
data_description.oauth_token: The oauth_token cookie value from accounts.google.com (starts with oauth2_4/)

extension.title: Connect with Chrome Extension
extension.description:
1. [Download the Nest Auth Helper extension]({extension_download_url})
2. Unzip and load it in Chrome (chrome://extensions → Developer Mode → Load Unpacked)
3. Sign in to [home.nest.com]({nest_url})
4. Click the extension icon → click **Extract Credentials**
5. Copy the code and paste it below

⚠️ Do not share this code — it contains your session credentials.

data_description.auth_code: The code displayed by the Nest Auth Helper extension

account_link.title: Connect Your Nest Account
account_link.description:
Follow these steps to get your credentials:

1. Open an **Incognito/Private** browser window
2. Enable **third-party cookies** in browser settings
3. Go to [home.nest.com]({nest_url}) and sign in with Google
4. Open **Developer Tools** (F12) → **Network** tab → Check **Preserve Log**
5. In the filter box, type `issueToken` and copy the full **Request URL**
6. In the filter box, type `oauth2/iframe`, click the last request, and copy the entire **Cookie** header value

⚠️ Do not log out of home.nest.com after copying credentials

data_description.cookies: Complete cookie string from the oauth2/iframe request headers

cookie_auth_expired.title: Nest Protect authentication expired for {title}
cookie_auth_expired.description: Your Nest credentials have expired or were revoked. Re-authenticate to restore updates. The **Master token** method is the most durable option (it only expires when you change your Google password); the cookie/extension methods expire every few hours. See docs/authentication.md for details.
